Transforming materials with Gemini Omni. 📸 I really like how consistent it kept the 3d structure of my original object. Omni enables new possibilities for grounding creation in your physical world.

Prompt: Keep the video exactly the same until the moment the hand touches the glass pitcher. The moment it touches the glass pitcher, make the material of the pitcher instantly change (hard cuts) every 1 seconds to a new material with the exact same 3d structure and ridges: a new bright gradient glass color, antique bronze, ceramic stone, worn vintage wooden (keeping the vertical ridges), then conclude with it turning into a 3d line art hologram with subtle vhs retro glitches as it disappears. But keep it all photorealistic but keep all movement exactly the same. Always have the pitcher's 3d structure remain exactly the same as it changes materials.
 | 61 comments on LinkedIn
